wikitext.*:
The '''Everyday Collection''' is a collection of [[clothing]] items always available in [[Mr. Prickles' Shop|Mr. Prickle's Shop]], and [[furniture]] and interior items always available in [[Finkea Furnishings]]. These items are considered the basics, and include many full collections, as well as various items from other collections.

== Clothing ==

=== Collections ===
*[[Pride Collection]]
*[[Accessibility Collection]]
*[[PJ Collection]]
*[[Daily Collection]]
*[[Snow Collection]]
